  "findings": [
    "H2S sensor is not reading or is displaying an error/null value indicated by dashes",
    "Pre-entry atmospheric testing is incomplete without a valid H2S reading"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Deny entry authorization immediately",
    "Remove the 4-gas monitor from service for inspection, calibration, or sensor replacement",
    "Re-test the confined space atmosphere with a fully functional, calibrated 4-gas monitor before authorizing entry"
  ],
  "rationale": "The 4-gas monitor shows a null or error reading ('--') for the H2S channel. Under OSHA 1910.146, a complete and accurate pre-entry atmospheric test for all regulated hazards (including toxic gases like H2S) must be performed and verified before entry can be authorized. A malfunctioning or non-reading sensor fails to verify safe conditions.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.146(c)(5)(ii)(C)",
    "OSHA 1910.146(d)(5)"
  ]
